title: taraxacum songoricum
intro: Taraxacum songoricum, also known as Mongolian dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum songoricum include reducing blood sugar levels, improving liver function, and aiding in the treatment of certain types of cancer. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
